definition: The nose as a sense faculty within the six sense fields.
notes: The project prefers nose as the direct default. Olfactory faculty is acceptable in technical prose where the analytical role matters more than ordinary idiom.

context_rules.context: In most source-facing and doctrinal contexts
In analytical prose emphasizing the faculty-role
context_rules.notes: Use when the technical structure needs to be explicit.

example_phrases.pali: ghānañca paṭicca gandhe ca uppajjati ghānaviññāṇaṃ
example_phrases.translation: dependent on the nose and odors, nose-consciousness arises

example_phrases.notes: Shows the term inside āyatana analysis.
